name: Citrus Chicken and Rice Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken and 1/3 cup teriyaki sauce in a bowl. Refrigerate for 1-2 hours.
2. Drain the chicken; slice into thin strips. Stir-fry the chicken in oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until cooked through, about 5 minutes.
3. Add sesame seeds, ginger, walnuts, and remaining 3 tbsp teriyaki sauce to the skillet. Stir-fry with rice until heated through.
4. Add orange and lemon slices. Serve.
